title: Anchor Words: Minimum-Size Binary Covering Codes for r-Fault Memory
strategies: natural-order first-fit (each uncovered word becomes an anchor) -- the baseline
local look-ahead: anchor the best of a word and its single-bit neighbours
full-ball max-coverage greedy: anchor the ball centre covering the most uncovered words
linear/coset covering codes, simulated annealing or ILP over anchor placements (open)
